title: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas elevates 18 lawyers to Partnership
description: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas has announced the elevation of 18 lawyers to Partnership across practices and offices, effective May 1, 2026.The following lawyers have been made Partner:Corporate:Abhilasha Malpani, Corporate, MumbaiAnirud Sudarsan, Corporate, MumbaiArpita Sengupta, Digital+ | TMT, MumbaiAyushi Toshniwal, Corporate, MumbaiKrithika Radhakrishnan, Employment, BengaluruShruthi Ashok, Corporate, BengaluruSubhankar Pasalapudi, Corporate, BengaluruSupriya Aakulu, Corporate, BengaluruDispute
